metadata.title: Key-Based Instrument Controllers
metadata.summary: MIDI specification document: Key-Based Instrument Controllers.

description: title: Key-Based Instrument Controllers protocol: midi1 source: .midi-raw-data/Key-Based Instrument Controllers – MIDI.org.html sourceType: local sha256: 06ea8c5c59eb59dc5322e6535f5d459b5bf527bd943a283addb6a39b3dd7ebca extractedAt: 2026-07-16T12:54:06.945Z summary: MIDI specification document: Key-Based Instrument Controllers. --- The Key-Based Instrument Controller message is intended to be a standard method of providing individual key-based instruments with the same performance control that is available for Channel-based instruments. ca23 Key-based Instrument Controller SysEx Message.pdf The Key-Based Instrument Controller message is intended to be a standard method of providing individual key-based instruments with the same performance control that is available for Channel-based instruments. Specific responses to this message may be defined in a separate recommended practice, such as General MIDI 2.

download_file.file_name: ca23 Key-based Instrument Controller SysEx Message.pdf
